Hey Product Hunt 👋

I’m Serena, founder of Fuzzy AI.

We kept seeing the same thing happen: someone sends a cold message to a complete stranger, it gets ignored, and they’re told to solve the problem by sending even more messages.

But what if volume isn’t the real problem?

What if the problem is that you’re still a stranger?

That’s why we built Fuzzy.

Fuzzy is a relationship-first AI sales platform that warms up your prospects before you ever reach out—so your first message doesn’t feel cold. [...] Subscribe

results.title: Fuzzy AI — Sales & CRM — Visalytica
results.content:
Fuzzy AI is an innovative outreach tool designed to warm prospects before initiating contact, addressing a common challenge in outbound sales and marketing. By identifying and engaging with individuals already active in your target market through content interactions and thoughtful commenting, Fuzzy AI helps users build familiarity and trust. It then facilitates personalized LinkedIn and email campaigns that speak in your voice, creating a more genuine connection. The platform consolidates research, data enrichment, sequence management, reply handling, and team workflows into a seamless interface, making it easier for sales and marketing teams to operate efficiently. Its intuitive design and comprehensive feature set make it a preferred choice for teams seeking a smarter, more human [...] Fuzzy AI

results.title: Best Closely Alternative for 2026: Why Teams Pick Fuzzy | Fuzzy AI Blog
results.content:
Fuzzy generates unique messaging per prospect using AI and a deep variable set. Each touchpoint pulls from the prospect's role, company context, recent activity, and your prior interactions with them. The result is messages that feel like you spent five minutes researching each person. You didn't. The AI did it in seconds.

That's the difference between a 3% reply rate and a 15% reply rate.

### Authority-led selling vs cold blasting

Fuzzy's sequence architecture is built around one principle: warm before you pitch. [...] ### The shift from volume to authority

Response rates on templated LinkedIn messages have been dropping year over year. The spray-and-pray era is over. Teams that warm prospects before outreach (profile views, content engagement, strategic touchpoints) see significantly higher conversion rates than teams that lead with a cold pitch.

This isn't about being "less salesy." It's about being smarter. When a prospect sees your name three times before you message them, the conversation starts differently. You're not a stranger anymore. You're someone they've already noticed.

### What to look for in a Closely alternative

If you're evaluating a closely alternative, here's what actually matters: [...] ## Frequently asked questions about switching from Closely

### Is Fuzzy a direct closely alternative?

Yes. Fuzzy covers everything Closely does: LinkedIn sequences, prospecting, and outreach automation. But it adds AI-powered personalisation with 75+ variables, authority-building sequences that warm prospects before you pitch, and conversation memory that tracks every interaction. It's a closely alternative that upgrades every part of the outreach workflow.

### Can I migrate my Closely campaigns to Fuzzy?
